content: Ran daily standup. Reviewed yesterday's progress and planned API implementation.
Morning all. UI components landed yesterday — nice one, Kai. Today we're tackling the API endpoints and docs.
Next up: API endpoints. Need /api/v2/dashboard and /api/v2/widgets. Use the existing auth middleware — should be straightforward.
summary: Delegated API endpoint implementation to kai

content: Got it! Let me check the existing middleware first, then I'll get started.
Hey Alex, quick question. The existing auth middleware doesn't handle v2 rate limiting. Should I update the middleware first, or just handle it on the v2 side?
Good catch. Long term, middleware-level would be cleaner. But for this release, a thin wrapper on the v2 side is fine. We'll do it properly in v0.3.
summary: Advised v2-side rate limit wrapper approach

content: Makes sense! Going with the v2 wrapper approach.
API endpoints done! /api/v2/dashboard and /api/v2/widgets with 92% test coverage. PR #43 is ready!
Great pace. I'll review it now.
Alex, posted a progress summary on general!

summary: Day 2 done. API complete, PR approved. Ready for release tomorrow.
